name: ConsentGateEnforcer
purpose: Unconditional consent gate at ORDER 1 — blocks all downstream ad processing on missing or revoked consent (GDPR/CCPA)
ironRules: IR-1: Consent check at ORDER 1 unconditionally before any auction processing. Zero business exception paths.
IR-2: consentRecord absent OR adsConsent=false OR expiresAt < now() → emit ConsentGateFailed immediately.
IR-3: ConsentGateFailed includes userId, reason (MISSING|REVOKED|EXPIRED), timestamp.
IR-4: tenantId from ALS only — never from event payload.
freedomComponents: consent_check_timeout_ms — max time to wait for consent service response
